coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:48 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:48 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/3. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/3. Target: 115% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/3. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 4:00 at 110-115%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 3.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/3. Duration: 4:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/3. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% complete. Rep 2/3. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 18 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 18 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 95% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 10:00 at 95%. Then 4min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 4min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 10:00 at 95%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 95% × 10:00. Give it everything. 4min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 88% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 4:12. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
